steps.title: Write each distance
steps.content: Distance equals speed times time. Walking for $w$ hours at $3$ miles per hour gives $3w$ miles. Jogging for $r$ hours at $8$ miles per hour gives $8r$ miles.

steps.title: Set the total distance
steps.content:
The combined distance is $19$ miles, so add the walking and jogging distances.
$$3w+8r=19$$
The answer is A.
